LOCATIONS
FRANCHISE

The French Workshop

is an artisan bakery chain founded in 2015, drawing inspiration from the boulangeries of Paris.

With a refined, open-concept workshop, we proudly showcase our signature pastries, cakes, croissants, and sandwiches,

along with an extensive selection of coffees and beverages.

Our talented team creates a warm, inviting atmosphere where customers can enjoy a unique and authentic experience.

featured

products

Breakfast & lunch sandwiches

DESSERTS

ready to go selections

​

Reviews

I LOVE the french workshop! Is definitely one of my favorite places to go! I was craving some key lime pie and I liked it a lot. My mom loved her dessert and I LOVED my ice matcha latte with oat milk! The service was quick and the ambience is really nice and calm!

Joseline B.

Very beautiful spot, nice staff! Everything looks delicious. I wish I could taste everything! I ordered a sandwich that looked so good I couldn't wait to eat it I also ordered an almond croissant which was spectacular! And a Chocolate Tart which was amazing! Highly recommend!

Genevieve K.

Very clean establishment with a wide array of pastries, sandwiches and coffee choices. Staff was friendly and pleasant and service was fast. I am glad I stumbled upon this beautiful establishment.

Dana N.

Best pastry spot! I would definitely come back! I tried their creme brûlée and it was the best thing ever. Melts in your mouth with the right amount of caramel on the top. Not too sweet. I couldn't stop eating it! Came back and got this chocolate dessert, forgot the name but it was chocolate heaven. Normally, chocolate is too much for me, but this was not too sweet or chocolatey at all! Their fruits are also super sweet

Marina W.
